titleStmt.title: SII 26.699: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 699. (A.R. No. 652 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº [••• ••• ••••] (Vikramachōḷadēva): Year 3, Mēsha (Chittirai) [. .] 13, Svāti = 1120 A.D., April 15. The paksha was śukla and the tithi was 15.

summary.p: This inscription is very much damaged and so only a few particulars can be gleaned. It contains the praśasti of the king (name lost) commencing with Pumālai miḍaindu, etc.

It appears to state that the Peruṁguṟi mahāsabhai of Tirunalam, assembled and decided to sell some land in the place, probably to a person (name lost), the kiḻavaṉ of Mādavūr in Ambara-nāḍu in the same [vaḷa]-nāḍu, who probably endorsed the same to the temple to provide for feeding the Śivasōgi (Śivayōgi) who visited the temple as apūrvis (coming without previous notice). It further states that the sabhai made the land tax-free in this connection.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmālai miṭaintu poṉ
mālai tikaḻtarappāmālaiyaṇinta paru
maṇittiraḷ puyattirunilamaṭantai yo
ṭu tirumakaḷ ruppakkaṉavarai māmata
n tenap peṟṟu tirumakaḷ Oru tani Iruppa
kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiram puṇarnta kaṟppi
narāki viruppoṭu nāvakattiruppa ti
caitoṟum tikiti Oṭu ceṅkol naṭa
ppa Akilapuvanamum kavippa toru putuma
karuṅkali O tai vanpelittiṭaikki
ṭappa kuḷattiṭait teliṅkaviman vilaṅ
kal micai yeṟavum kaliṅka pūmiyai
k kanaleri pavum Aiyam paṭaip paru
vattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkai maṇṭa
lam tāṅkinitiruntu vaṭaticai Aṭippa
ttaruḷi catta vaḻantāṉamum vetamum
mel me tam pola talaittalai ci

urimaiyiṟ cūṭi manniṟ kellāmanṉuyar ta pola
tannoḷi parappat tanitta nimāṉu maṇamuḻutuṅ kaḷippaṭave
ṉṟi vaḷantun koṟṟavar caṟppuṟattu maṇināvoṭu maṅ
kaḻuraicukaḷ muḻaṅka vijaiyamum pukaḻum menmel Oṅka
ceḻiyar veñcuram puka ceralar kaṭal pukkiḻitara ciṅ

kaṇar Ākak koṅkaṇar cāyamaṟṟet ticaimyannañam tanmakkāṇan
tirumalaṟ cevaṭi Urimaiy kula Iṟaiñca tollai Eḻu Ulakum toḻuteḻat
tonṟi mullai vāṇakai mukkokiḻānaṭi Umai Oṭu caṅkaran Imaiya Ota
tirunatte porunti Uṭaniruppa Āṅkavan miku kaṅkaiyoṭākiya terivai
yar tilamatiyāka patākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi purita kuḷavanitai tiripuvanamu
ṭaiyāḷavan tiruvuḷattaruḷa muḻutum muṭaiyāḷen Uṭaniruppa cem

pon virasiṅhāsanattu mu
kopparakecaripanvarāna ti
varkku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu meṣa
daśiyum peṟṟa coti nāḷ pū
runalattup peruṅkuṟi mahāsa
ṅ kuṟaivaṟa kūṭi Iruntu Ivvūr
ceykiṟa civacoki kavucikan pūmāṅka
nāṭṭu Amparanāṭṭu mātavūr kiḻava
veḷāraik koṇṭu Ikkoyilil tiru
ḷāy vanta civacokikaḷaiyum tavaci
mānārāyaṉa muventaveḷārai yaṭa
tirunāmatte kumaranārāyaṉa muventa
koṇṭu Apūrvikaḷāy vanta civacoki
muventaveḷācakkara kaṭuttāmam pa
yār Āti śaṇṭeśvaradevar tirunāma

ntirikaiy kiḻmukkālum viṟṟuk kuṭuttu ko
(�) tirunāmattāl Iṟaiyiḻiccik kuṭukka ko
cela Aṟa koṇṭu viṟṟu vi
nokkiya palluruvil payan
lattukku Uramāvinta peruvi
ttaval Iṟuttuk kuṭukka kaṭa
ṟaṭa paṇippāraiyum Iṟaiye

ṅkaḷāvaṟ Ivvūrc cempiyamātevi
rttu māṭalan coḻappirān tirunalamuṭai
pinānaḷapaṭṭan parameśvaranum nilamāy
vi vatikku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟ
reśvavaranum kavuṇiyan tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyān ti
lukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta Ina rā te
Digital edition of SII 26.699 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
